problem id: 5281a6b3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10110011 -> 00010111
  01101000 -> 10011100
  01101111 -> 11101101
  11101111 -> 11000101
  01100110 -> 01111111
  10011000 -> 10101111
  11110111 -> 01000010
  11011101 -> 11101010
  00011111 -> 11110110

query: 11011110
predicted answer: 11011010
